title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.440 - Refusal to issue, suspension or revocation of license, grounds — right to administrative review
text:
197.440.  Refusal to issue, suspension or revocation of license, grounds — right to administrative review. — 1.  The department shall refuse to issue or shall suspend or shall revoke the license of any home health agency for failure to comply with any provision of sections 197.400 to 197.475 or with any rule or standard of the department adopted under the provisions of sections 197.400 to 197.475 or for obtaining the license by means of fraud, misrepresentation, or concealment of material facts.
  2.  Any home health agency which has been refused a license or which has had its license revoked or suspended by the department may seek a review of the department's action by the administrative hearing commission.
(L. 1983 H.B. 51 § 8)
